sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109902" key="u(yhgori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψηγορ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n109902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stateliness of phrase, lofty expression,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:206" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">206</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
